title: Samay Pizza Food Delivery Website - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Rebuild entire application as a 3-page Samay Pizza website with Deep Red and White theme, removing all Funded Flex branding
acceptanceCriteria: All Funded Flex branding and content is removed
Site has exactly 3 pages: Home, Menu, and Order/Checkout
Deep Red and White theme is applied consistently across all pages
Site is fully mobile-responsive on all screen sizes
Navigation links between Home, Menu, and Order pages work correctly

file_operations.description: Update page title from 'Funded Flex' to 'Samay Pizza - Best Pizza in Gorakhpur'

Replace all five existing routes (Home, About Us, Contact Us, Solutions, Institutional Funding) with three new routes: Home (/), Menu (/menu), and Order (/order). Update RootLayout to use the new Samay Pizza Navbar and Footer components.

Replace Funded Flex navigation with Samay Pizza branding. Update nav links to Home, Menu, and Order pages. Apply deep red (#B71C1C) background with white text. Replace 'Get Funded' CTA with restaurant phone number or logo. Ensure mobile menu works with new routes.

Replace FundedFlex footer content with Samay Pizza information: restaurant name, address (Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur, U.P.), WhatsApp contact (+918957401994), email (monikakgupta2507@gmail.com), and website (samaypizza.com). Apply deep red accents and white background theme.

Replace dark theme color tokens (obsidian, cobalt, silver-mist, gold) with Samay Pizza Deep Red and White theme. Set CSS custom properties: --primary to #B71C1C or #C0392B (deep red), --background to white/off-white, --foreground to dark gray for text, --accent to lighter red variant. Remove glassmorphism and dark-theme-specific styles. Add food-appropriate hover transitions and card shadows.

Update Tailwind theme to match Samay Pizza branding: replace brand colors (obsidian, cobalt, gold) with 'pizzaRed': '#B71C1C', 'pizzaRedDark': '#C0392B', 'warmWhite': '#FAFAFA'. Update semantic color variables to support red-and-white palette. Keep Inter font family or switch to a warm, readable font for restaurant context.
Remove existing Funded Flex Home page (Hero, stats, CoreServices, CTA banner)
Remove About Us page (not needed for Samay Pizza)
Remove Contact Us page (not needed for Samay Pizza)
Remove Solutions page (not needed for Samay Pizza)
Remove Institutional Funding page (not needed for Samay Pizza)
Remove Funded Flex Hero component (replaced by new Samay Pizza hero in Home page)
Remove CoreServices component (not applicable to Samay Pizza)
Remove TeamSection component (not needed for Samay Pizza)
Remove DataGlobe component (not applicable to Samay Pizza)
Remove generic ContactForm component (order form is different and integrated into Order page)

requirements.summary: Create Home page with hero section, fast delivery icons, 'Order Now' button, and footer with restaurant details
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' prominently
Fast delivery icons/badges are visible in the hero or below it
'Order Now' button navigates to the Menu page
Footer shows address: Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur (U.P.)
Footer shows WhatsApp: +918957401994 and email: monikakgupta2507@gmail.com

file_operations.description: Create new Home page component with: (1) Large hero section featuring the generated hero banner image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x500.png) as background, overlaid with 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' headline in white text and a subheadline about fresh pizza and fast delivery; (2) Fast delivery feature section below the hero displaying icons/badges (e.g., '30-Min Delivery', 'Fresh Ingredients', 'Hot & Tasty') with red icons on white cards; (3) A prominent red 'Order Now' button that uses React Router's Link or navigate to go to '/menu'; (4) Mobile-responsive layout with stacked sections on small screens. Apply deep red (#B71C1C) for CTA buttons and accents, white for content areas.

requirements.summary: Create Menu page with categorized items (Pizza, Chinese, Rice, Burger, Snacks) showing pricing and 'Add to Cart' functionality
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 categories are displayed with clear section headers
All pizza items show Regular/Medium/Large size options with correct prices
All Chinese and Rice items show Half/Full options with correct prices
All burger items show fixed price
Snacks/Extras section is displayed
'Add to Cart' button works and updates cart count/state
Size/variant selector appears before adding to cart where applicable

file_operations.description: Create Menu page component that renders 5 category sections (Pizza, Chinese, Rice, Burger, Snacks/Extras) with clear red-accented headers. Each menu item is displayed as a white card with item name, description (optional), size/variant selector (dropdown or radio buttons for pizzas, Chinese, Rice items), price display, and a red 'Add to Cart' button. Wire up 'Add to Cart' to call a context or hook function (e.g., useCart) that updates global cart state. Display a cart icon with item count in the Navbar or a floating cart button. Ensure mobile responsiveness with stacked cards. Pizza items: Cheese Corn (₹90/150/250), Spicy Indian (₹100/150/250), Simply Veg, Paneer Ka Maza, Double Cheese, Paneer Makhani, Sabz Bahar, Samay Pizza Special (₹150/180/300), Tandoori Paneer, Veggie Supreme, Best Pataka, Chatpata Paneer. Chinese items (Half/Full): Veg Chowmein (₹50/100), Paneer Chowmein (₹60/120), Mix Chowmein, Paneer Chilli, Paneer Chilli Gravy, Chilli Potato, Veg Manchurian Dry/Gravy. Rice items (Half/Full): Veg Fried Rice (₹50/100), Paneer Fried Rice (₹60/120), Veg Biryani (₹70/130). Burger items: Veg Burger (₹40), Classic Burger (₹60), Veg Cheese Burger (₹60), Classic Cheese Burger (₹80). Snacks/Extras: French Fries, Lava Cake, Extra Cheese/Toppings (add pricing as needed or mark as 'Add-on').

Create a React context and provider (CartProvider) to manage cart state globally. State includes an array of cart items (each with item name, size/variant, price, quantity). Expose functions: addToCart(item), removeFromCart(itemId), updateQuantity(itemId, quantity), clearCart(), and a computed totalPrice. Wrap the App or router with CartProvider so all pages can access cart state.

Create a custom hook useCart() that returns the cart context (cart items, addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, totalPrice). This hook is used by MenuPage and OrderPage components to interact with the cart.

requirements.summary: Create Order/Checkout page with cart summary, customer form, WhatsApp 'Place Order' button, and UPI payment section with QR code
acceptanceCriteria: Cart summary lists all added items with sizes and subtotals
Total price is calculated and displayed correctly
Customer form has Name, Phone Number, and Address fields with validation
'Place Order' opens WhatsApp link for +918957401994 with pre-filled order message
WhatsApp message includes item list, total, name, phone, and address
UPI ID 'monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank' is displayed
UPI QR code image is rendered on the page

file_operations.description: Create Order/Checkout page component with three sections: (1) Cart Summary: Display all items from useCart() with item name, size/variant, quantity, and price. Show calculated total price. Include buttons to adjust quantity or remove items. If cart is empty, show a message and a link back to Menu. (2) Customer Form: Controlled form with fields for Name, Phone Number (10-digit validation), and Delivery Address (textarea). Include client-side validation and error messages. (3) Place Order Button: On click, validate form, construct a WhatsApp message string with order details (item list, total, customer name, phone, address), then open window.open('https://wa.me/918957401994?text=' + encodeURIComponent(message)). (4) UPI Payment Section: Display heading 'Pay via UPI', show UPI ID 'monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank' as text, render the generated QR code image (frontend/public/assets/generated/upi-qr-code.dim_300x300.png) in a white card with red border, and include a 'Pay Now' button (informational or links to UPI app if possible). Use deep red for primary buttons, white cards, and ensure mobile responsiveness.

Create a custom hook usePlaceOrder() that returns a mutation function to submit order details to the backend via actor.placeOrder(customerName, phoneNumber, address, orderItems, totalPrice). Use TanStack Query's useMutation. On success, optionally show a toast notification and clear the cart. This hook is called from OrderPage after the WhatsApp link is opened (or as a secondary backup to persist order data in the backend).

requirements.summary: Apply Deep Red and White design theme across the entire site with food-appropriate styling and hover effects
acceptanceCriteria: Primary brand color is deep red used consistently on CTAs, headers, and highlights
Content areas use white/off-white backgrounds for readability
Menu item cards have hover effects
Buttons have red background with white text
Overall design feels professional and food-brand appropriate

file_operations.description: Update Button component default variant to use deep red (#B71C1C) background and white text. Add hover state with slightly darker red (#A91C1C). Ensure destructive and secondary variants also align with the red-and-white theme. Maintain existing shadcn/ui structure but override color tokens.

Update Card component to use white background with subtle shadow. On hover, apply a light red border or shadow effect. Ensure CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter all support the Samay Pizza theme with warm typography and red accents where appropriate.
